subject: Re: Sikorsky S-76C++
body:
split it 12.95


----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, December 13, 2007 10:12:37 AM
Subject: FW: Sikorsky S-76C++


 
 
From: Sean J. Lancaster [mailto:bristolgv@earthlink.net] 
Sent: Thursday, December 13, 2007 10:08 AM
To: lvjet@aol.com; Lesley Groff; Darren Indyke; Lesley Groff
Subject: FW: Sikorsky S-76C++
 
Please find the offer as per my email this morning.  Please be advised I have told them $13.0 firm on the pricing.  They insist this the maximum they will pay.
 
Best regards 
 
 
Sean J. Lancaster
Bristol Associates Inc.
1-540-665-5135 direct
1-202-682-4000 ext 1130 Main Office
1-540-533-8183 Mobile
1-540-301-0050 FAX
slancaster@bristolassociates.com
www.bristolassociates.com 
 
This message may contain confidential and/or legally privileged information.  If you are not the intended recipient of the message, please destroy it. Any unauthorized dissemination, distribution or copying of the material in this message, and any attachments to the message, is strictly forbidden. (c) 2007 all rights reserved.
 
From: Rick Smith [mailto:rsmith@baliaircraft.com] 
Sent: Thursday, December 13, 2007 9:18 AM
To: slancaster@bristolassociates.com
Subject: Sikorsky S-76C++
 
Sean:
 
As promised, attached is our offer for the S-76C++.  We’ve worked extremely hard to get to this point and will appreciate all your efforts to get this deal done.  Please let me know as soon as possible, if you hear from Mr. Epstein.
 
Respectfully,
Rick Smith
Vice President
Business Aircraft Leasing, Inc.
615.361.3781 (ph)
615.367.1226 (fax)
www.baliaircraft.com
